---
title: "GLM Assignment"
author: "Brian D. Gerber"
date: "2022-09-07"
output: html_document
---

<style type="text/css">
  body{
  font-size: 12pt;
}
pre{
  font-size: 20px; 
}
</style>

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

### **Objective**: To learn about genearlized linear models (GLM) by evaluating characteristics.

### **Markdown**
Together, we will outline two study design evaluations that use generalized linear models. 

You will develop code that is implemented and explained within a markdown file.
